title: PETZL TIKKA CORE Headlamp — 450 Lumens, Yellow
short_description: A rechargeable yellow PETZL TIKKA CORE headlamp with 450 lumens, a CORE battery, red lighting and optional operation with three AAA batteries.
long_description: The PETZL TIKKA CORE E067AA03 is a compact rechargeable headlamp in yellow. With the included CORE battery, it delivers up to 450 lumens while weighing 84 grams. Its wide, uniform beam is suitable for camping, hiking and close-range tasks. It also provides continuous and flashing red lighting. Thanks to the HYBRID CONCEPT design, it can alternatively run on three AAA/LR03 batteries. This Amazon variant uses a Micro-USB charging connection.
buying_angle: Suitable for camping, night hiking and close-range work when a lightweight rechargeable headlamp with red lighting and optional battery operation is useful.
seo_title: PETZL TIKKA CORE 450 Lumens Yellow | Daily Deal Finder
meta_description: Yellow PETZL TIKKA CORE E067AA03 headlamp with 450 lumens, CORE battery, red lighting, 84 g weight and optional AAA battery operation.

pinterest_description: The yellow PETZL TIKKA CORE offers up to 450 lumens, a CORE battery, red lighting and optional use with three AAA batteries. Useful for camping and night hiking. #petzl #headlamp #camping
